headline: Sone Capital Management Adds to MarketAxess Stake, According to Recent SEC Filing
summary: MarketAxess sits at the center of the shift toward electronic bond trading and investors are watching whether record activity is turning into deeper client reliance on its trading, data, and automation tools.

headline: UP refutes new AG claims, says it provided all answers in merger paperwork
summary: Union Pacific refuted claims by the top law enforcement officials of six states that it omitted key data in its revised merger application with Norfolk Southern. The post UP refutes new AG claims, says it provided all answers in merger paperwork appeared first on FreightWaves.
